	ProcessArrayDataPrep 40 00 00 00 
	Call f6 22 00 00 // ProcessType[map[int]main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument]
	ProcessSliceDataRepeat 08 00 00 00 
	Return 
// 0x2215: ProcessType[bucket<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 88 00 00 00 
	Call 95 20 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<int,main.aStructNotUsedAsAnArgument>]
	Return 
// 0x2220: ProcessType[bucket<string,int>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 08 00 00 00 
	Call bb 21 00 00 // ProcessType[[]key<string>]
	IncrementOutputOffset 40 00 00 00 
	Call 9b 20 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<string,int>]
	Return 
// 0x2235: ProcessType[bucket<string,main.bigStruct>]

	Call bb 21 00 00 // ProcessType[[]key<string>]
	Call f5 21 00 00 // ProcessType[[]val<main.bigStruct>]
	Call a1 20 00 00 // ProcessType[*bucket<string,main.bigStruct>]
